ocr_findings.description: Answer line at page bottom contains spurious artifacts: '問題6-1 イ　^{}[] 問題6-2 イ　^{}[] 問題6-3 エ　^{}[] 問題6-4 エ' — the '^{}[]' sequences appear between answer entries in OCR but are absent from the image. Answer letters (イ/イ/エ/エ) are correctly captured.
Answer line is present and correct (イ/イ/エ/エ); no loss of answer letters. The '^{}[]' artifacts are noise insertions between entries rather than losses.

reviewer_notes: Exam page with 4 questions (問題6-1 to 6-4) in ア/イ/ウ/エ format covering システム開発テスト and ソフトウェア結合テスト topics. All question text and choice text are accurately captured. Answer letters are present and correct; the '^{}[]' noise between answers is a minor OCR artifact.
